creator: gobledb@gmail.com
text:
Spanish Dvorak keyboard model to syscons

=====>Instructions
Rename spanish.dvorak.kbd.txt to spanish.dvorak.kbd

Put on /usr/share/syscons/keymaps/

Load atm kbdcontrol -l /usr/share/syscons/keymaps/spanish.dvorak.kbd

"For ever" rc.conf 
keymap="spanish.dvorak"

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
